name: phone-management
description: Gestion des numéros SOS Villages d'Enfants Maroc
author: SOS Villages d'Enfants Maroc

scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix backend install
scripts.electron:dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npx electron-builder build --win portable
scripts.electron:package: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && electron-packager . Gestion-Numeros-SOS-Villages --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-electron --overwrite --ignore=dist-electron --ignore=.git --ignore=frontend/src --ignore=backend/src
